title: Lunar Pack Display
description: Displays your current resource pack with thumbnail, name, and customizable HUD. Features draggable position, scalable size, and toggleable options.
body:
# How to Use:

Use **/packdisplay** command to open settings GUI

- Toggle HUD visibility, background, and pack thumbnail
- Click and drag the HUD to reposition it
- In GUI, use the corner handle to resize the display

## Features:

- Displays current resource pack with thumbnail and name
- Clean formatting removes pack color codes and file extensions
- Draggable HUD with position saving
- Scalable interface with resize handle
- Toggleable background and thumbnail display
- All settings automatically saved

## Description:

**A clean, customizable HUD that shows your current Minecraft resource pack. Inspired by Lunar Client's pack display feature, now available for Forge 1.8.9 with additional customization options.**

## Credits:
HeightLight, AnikDas Gaming, Tajbiul

# Support:
For issues or suggestions, contact on Discord: **Worst_Boy**
